speaker: Interviewer
text: Hello Priyanshu, welcome! Thank you for joining us today. To start, could you please briefly introduce yourself and tell us a bit about your background?

speaker: Candidate
text: गुड मॉर्निंग, माय नेम इज शुभम लोले. आय एम करेंटली पर्सीविंग कंप्यूटर इंजीनियरिंग इन दत्ता मंगे कॉलेज ऑफ इंजीनियरिंग, ऐहोली. माय की स्टॅक्स इज फुल स्टॅक पायथन डेव्हलपमेंट. माय स्किल्स इंक्लूड पायथन, माय सिक्वल फॉर डेटाबेस, पोस्ट विथ सिक्वल, जांगो, मशीन लर्निंग अँड डेव्हॉप्स.

speaker: Interviewer
text:
Thank you, Priyanshu, for the introduction. It's good to hear about your skills and interests.

Looking at your resume, you've worked on an "AI-Powered Conversational Recommendation Chatbot." Could you elaborate on the product filtering and ranking mechanisms you implemented there? How did you approach selecting the features for ranking different products?
